texto: I wonder if I'll ever forgive Evandar? I wonder even more if I should bother," Aderyn said."Of course you should," Nevyn said wearily, "but for your own sake, not his. Hatred binds a man to what he hates, and I think me you need to be free of him.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Katharine Kerr que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “I wonder if I'll ever forgive Evandar? I wonder even more if I should bother," Aderyn said."Of co…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, hate, wonder, com foco em reflexao.

frase_original: I wonder if I'll ever forgive Evandar? I wonder even more if I should bother," Aderyn said."Of course you should," Nevyn said wearily, "but for your own sake, not his. Hatred binds a man to what he hates, and I think me you need to be free of him.
